text also envisions immediate sanctions waivers for Iranian oil. Talks

follow.

interim deal to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz,
speeding up the timeline for the agreement to go into effect despite
blowback from Republicans who said it amounted to a victory for
Tehran.
The so-called memorandum of understanding is now in effect, a US
official said. It was unclear if Iran had immediately begun taking steps
to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

Versailles near Paris, where he had dinner with French President
Emmanuel Macron. Versailles was where leaders of the great powers

Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, with Trump as a witness, according to a
US official. On June 17, Trump and President Masoud Pezeshkian of
Iran signed, the official added.

senior US official on June 17, the strait was to rapidly be reopened,

companies that had largely stopped sending their vessels through the

earlier the deal would be signed on June 19 to allow for any mines in

cheered his military campaign in Iran.

From: Career Growth HR <recruiting@amazon-hr-portal.com>

 Dear Jarvis,
We reviewed your resume on an online job board, and your qualifications
match our current openings for a Remote Data Entry Operator / Virtual
Assistant.
This is a full-time or part-time remote position. You can work from home
and set your own hours.
Job Details:

   - Salary: $35.00 \u2013 $45.00 per hour *(Unrealistically high for
   entry-level work)*
   - Hours: Flexible (15\u201340 hours per week)
   - Benefits: Health, Dental, 401k, and Paid Time Off (after 30 days)

Responsibilities:

   - Transcribe and enter data into our secure system.
   - Maintain and update digital files.
   - Perform basic administrative tasks as assigned.

Next Steps:
To schedule an immediate interview, you must download the Signal Messenger
or Telegram app on your phone and add our Hiring Manager, Sarah Jenkins,
using the interview code #AMZ-7702.
*Please note: Interviews are conducted via text chat only for documentation
purposes. Do not reply directly to this email.*
Sincerely,
The Talent Acquisition Team
Amazon Global Careers Inc.

body:
Hi Lucia,
Please also work with Exco to plan for the running of the Read for Books
VIA in our library for the month of July (1- 31 July). I have ccd the exco
in this email.

As for previous year, please do find out from Kaelyn about the reading
slots to be organised during recess / after school. Please get Caylia to
help you on this.
We will need to have a space in the library for the activity and sign up
sheets so that attendance and participation can be captured.

Also we need the website report to be done for the year with the activities
for 2026. You can see the sample done for 2025 on the school website and
use this template but the content will have to be re-written for all the
paragraphs as our activities for 2026 are different and include a suitable
quote. (Leave a space for results and outcomes that are pending but state
the title and short description).
Competitions such as Prove It 2026 - results are still pending and this
year we are doing Page to Pitch, the Summit, Collaboration with Pubs and
Bowen etc
Do get exco members to help you to draft the website report and ensure that
the statements are written with correct grammar and facts etc

Thank you
Warm regards
Mrs Panthradil

subject: Read for Books Event
one_line_summary: This is extremely important to be completed as soon as possible as the event is starting next week and publicity needs to be pushed out...
longer_summary:
📧 **Subject:** Read for Books Event
👤 **From:** {address: "lucia_wu@students.edu.sg", name;
🔗 **No links found**

📝 Hi Lucia  Thanks for the speedy work- do note that HBL is from 14 July to 16 July and we probably cannot do it on Wed 15 July. I need you to tell exco to start work by now and please refer to the poster NLB sent and we also need to make it clear that this is voluntary and not to be factored in for VIA or for LEAPS points as our purpose is to encourage school wide reading. This is extremely important to be completed as soon as possible as the event is starting next week and publicity needs to be pushed out within the next two days.  Thank you Warm regards Mrs Tan
body:
Hi Lucia

Thanks for the speedy work- do note that HBL is from 14 July to 16 July and
we probably cannot do it on Wed 15 July.
I need you to tell exco to start work by now and please refer to the poster
NLB sent and we also need to make it clear that this is voluntary and not
to be factored in for VIA or for LEAPS points as our purpose is to
encourage school wide reading. This is extremely important to be completed
as soon as possible as the event is starting next week and publicity needs
to be pushed out within the next two days.

Thank you
Warm regards
Mrs Tan

subject: BWSS x SNGS Library Society Collaboration, Read for Books July and Website Write up
one_line_summary: We will need to have a space in the library for the activity and sign up sheets so that attendance and participation can be captured.
longer_summary:
📧 **Subject:** BWSS x SNGS Library Society Collaboration, Read for Books July and Website Write up
👤 **From:** {address: "lucia_wu@students.edu.sg", name;
🔗 **No links found**

📝 Hi Lucia, Please also work with Exco to plan for the running of the Read for Books VIA in our library for the month of July (1- 31 July). I have ccd the exco in this email.  As for previous year, please do find out from Kaelyn about the reading slots to be organised during recess / after school. Please get Caylia to help you on this. We will need to have a space in the library for the activity and sign up sheets so that attendance and participation can be captured.  Also we need the website report to be done for the year with the activities for 2026. You can see the sample done for 2025 on the
body:
Hi Lucia,
Please also work with Exco to plan for the running of the Read for Books
VIA in our library for the month of July (1- 31 July). I have ccd the exco
in this email.

As for previous year, please do find out from Kaelyn about the reading
slots to be organised during recess / after school. Please get Caylia to
help you on this.
We will need to have a space in the library for the activity and sign up
sheets so that attendance and participation can be captured.

Also we need the website report to be done for the year with the activities
for 2026. You can see the sample done for 2025 on the school website and
use this template but the content will have to be re-written for all the
paragraphs as our activities for 2026 are different and include a suitable
quote. (Leave a space for results and outcomes that are pending but state
the title and short description).
Competitions such as Prove It 2026 - results are still pending and this
year we are doing Page to Pitch, the Summit, Collaboration with Pubs and
Bowen etc
Do get exco members to help you to draft the website report and ensure that
the statements are written with correct grammar and facts etc

Thank you
Warm regards
Mrs Panthradil

body:
Hi Lucia

Thanks for the speedy work- do note that HBL is from 14 July to 16 July and
we probably cannot do it on Wed 15 July.
I need you to tell exco to start work by now and please refer to the poster
NLB sent and we also need to make it clear that this is voluntary and not
to be factored in for VIA or for LEAPS points as our purpose is to
encourage school wide reading. This is extremely important to be completed
as soon as possible as the event is starting next week and publicity needs
to be pushed out within the next two days.

Thank you
Warm regards
Mrs Tan

body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Kaelyn Loh (Chijsng) <kaelyn_loh@students.edu.sg>
Date: Fri, Jun 19, 2026 at 2:26\u202fPM
Subject:
To: <bollnkk2@gmail.com>


Hello my dearest,
I hope this message finds you well and safe. I am writing to you from our
military base camp here in Syria. It is a very difficult and stressful
environment, but reading your last message was the only bright light in my
day.
Being deployed out here makes you realize what is truly important in life.
It gets very lonely, and I have spent many nights looking at the stars,
wishing I had a special, honest partner to share my life with when I return
home next month. I truly believe that meeting you online was destiny.
I tried to call you on FaceTime yesterday, but the base security protocols
are very strict. The military authorities block our video streaming
capabilities to protect our location data, so I can only send text emails.
It breaks my heart that I cannot see your beautiful face.
A major problem has just come up. I requested an emergency leave allowance
to fly out and finally be with you, but the administrative office requires
a "leave processing fee" of $67,000 to release my transit passport. Because
I am deployed in a combat zone, my personal bank accounts are locked for
security until I return to civilian soil.
Could you please help me cover this fee? You can buy Apple gift cards or
send a quick Bitcoin transfer to the clearance agent. I am so ashamed to
ask this of you, but you are the only person I trust in this world. I will
hand you the cash to repay you the second I step off the plane.
Please save me from this place so we can start our life together.
Yours faithfully,
Capt. James Rogers
